step_rationale: DAMP amplifying plaque inflammation and platelet activation.
mechanism: High-mobility group box 1 (HMGB1) is a damage-associated molecular pattern released during ischemic injury that amplifies vascular inflammation and platelet thromboinflammatory activation in acute coronary events.

references.title: Platelet HMGB1 steers intravascular immunity and thrombosis.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

references.title: Circulating virome and inflammatory proteome in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction and primary ventricular fibrillation.
Inhibitory mechanisms of very low-dose rivaroxaban in non-ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
